response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform work; their resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile development with minimal evidence of cloud compute architecture, distributed systems, or C++ leadership — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and devops practices
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: Only 1-2 years of C++ exposure (NI LabWindows), far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric platform needs
